Title: International Phone Input for Umbraco Forms
Description: A custom Umbraco Forms field type that provides an international phone-number input with country-code dropdown, flags, E.164 validation and as-you-type formatting. Powered by the excellent intl-tel-input library.

AuthorDetails.Name: Meshari Aldebas
AuthorDetails.Description: Umbraco developer building community packages that make Forms better.

Screenshots.Caption: International phone field rendered on the front-end with flag dropdown and E.164 validation.
